name: a convention rule citing the cloud-architecture catalog is grounded
command:
printf %s 'resource "x" "y" {}
' > green.tf
printf %s '- id: t1
  source_id: aws-well-architected
  kind: patterning
  mode: require
  token: "resource"
  message: "m"
' > rs.yaml
bash $CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/cloud-conventions.sh --tool terraform --iac green.tf --ruleset rs.yaml
